title: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
impact: Users may have seen delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

updates.content:
Title: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center

User impact: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

More info: Impacted reports include the following:
-Microsoft 365 group reports
-Microsoft 365 active user reports
-Microsoft Teams team activity reports
-Adoption Score

Current status: We identified that an issue with an upstream data pipeline responsible for populating reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center is degraded, causing reporting delays. We're working with the upstream dependency owners to repair the issue and get the reporting data up to date.

Scope of impact: This issue may potentially impact any user attempting to view the affected reports in the More Info section.

Start time: Saturday, April 4, 2026, at 12:00 AM UTC

Root cause: An issue with an upstream data pipeline responsible for populating reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center is degraded, causing reporting delays.

Next update by: Wednesday, April 8, 2026, at 2:00 AM UTC

Title: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center

User impact: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

More info: Impacted reports include the following:
-Microsoft 365 group reports
-Microsoft 365 active user reports
-Microsoft Teams team activity reports
-Adoption Score
 
Current status: We’ve made the necessary changes to address the issue with the impacted upstream data pipeline and confirmed that recovery is in progress. We anticipate that the backlogged requests should process to completion to fully resolve this issue by our next scheduled update.
 
Scope of impact: This issue may impact any user attempting to view the affected reports in the More Info section. This information may be updated as our investigation continues.
 
Start time: Saturday, April 4, 2026, at 12:00 AM UTC
 
Root cause: An issue with an upstream data pipeline responsible for populating reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center is degraded, causing reporting delays.
 
Next update by: Wednesday, April 8, 2026, at 11:00 PM UTC

Title: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center

User impact: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

More info: Impacted reports include the following:
-Microsoft 365 group reports
-Microsoft 365 active user reports
-Microsoft Teams team activity reports
-Adoption Score

Current status: While most users should see relief, the backlog processing is taking longer than initially anticipated. We're continuing to monitor as the backlog progresses and will provide an updated remediation timeline once available.

Scope of impact: This issue may impact any user attempting to view the affected reports in the More Info section. This information may be updated as our investigation continues.

Start time: Saturday, April 4, 2026, at 12:00 AM UTC

Root cause: An issue with an upstream data pipeline responsible for populating reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center is degraded, causing reporting delays.

Next update by: Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 10:30 PM UTC

Title: Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center

User impact: Users may have seen delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

More info: Impacted reports included the following:
-Microsoft 365 group reports
-Microsoft 365 active user reports
-Microsoft Teams team activity reports
-Adoption Score
 
Final status: The backlog of report data completed processing and we've confirmed using our internal monitoring data that impact is remediated.
 
Scope of impact: This issue may have impacted any user that attempted to view the affected reports listed in the More Info section.
 
Start time: Saturday, April 4, 2026, at 12:00 AM UTC
 
End time: Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 1:00 AM UTC
 
Root cause: An issue with an upstream data pipeline responsible for populating reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center was degraded, causing reporting delays.
 
Next steps: 
- We're reviewing and improving our automated recovery services to detect and prevent similar upstream data pipeline issues if they occur in the future.
 
This is the final update for the event.
